navigation.description: Tutti i prodotti per la tua casa
Tutte le magliette escudendo le magliette da donna

product.name: Men's Black T-Shirt with White Logo
product.description: This is THE classic t-shirt. Its fine jersey cotton construction makes it extremely soft and comfortable to wear, so it's a good choice for a day-to-day outfit — it's durable and can withstand several washings while retaining its shape and color.

seo.title: Commerce Layer Store
seo.description: Commerce Layer is a transactional commerce API that lets you add multi-market ecommerce to any digital experience, with ease.
